name: nonebot-adapter-mail
documentation:
# NoneBot-Adapter-Mail _✨ Mail Adapter ✨_

## 配置 修改 `.env` 或 `.env.*` 文件以配置 Mail 适配器。 ### MAIL_BOTS - `id`: 电子邮件地址 - `name`: 显示名称 - `password`: 登录密码 - `subject`: 默认邮件主题 - `imap`: IMAP 配置 - `host`: IMAP 主机 - `port`: IMAP 端口 - `tls`: 是否使用 TLS - `smtp`: SMTP 配置 - `host`: SMTP 主机 - `port`: SMTP 端口 - `tls`: 是否使用 TLS 配置示例： ```dotenv MAIL_BOTS=' [ { "id": "i@example.com", "name": "Name", "password": "p4ssw0rd", "subject": "Sent by NoneBot", "imap": { "host": "imap.example.com", "port": 993, "tls": true }, "smtp": { "host": "smtp.example.com", "port": 465, "tls": true } } ] ' ``` ## 适配器默认行为 - 邮件主题按以下优先级解析： 1. 调用发送时传入的 `subject` 参数 2. 消息中的 `MessageSegment.subject` 段 3. 回复时使用 `Re: 原邮件主题` 4. 使用配置中的默认 `subject` - 发送函数可选参数： - `cc`: 抄送列表 - `bcc`: 密送列表 - `subject`: 邮件主题 - `in_reply_to`: 所回复的邮件的 Message ID - `references`: 邮件线程中的邮件 Message ID 列表 - `reply_to`: 接收方回复邮件时的默认地址列表 - 发送函数中未指定 `references` 但已指定 `in_reply_to` 时，`references` 默认设置为 `in_reply_to` - 快捷发送函数 `bot.send` 的 `reply=True` 时的配置： - `subject` 未指定时使用 `Re: 原邮件主题` - `in_reply_to` 未指定时使用原邮件的 Message ID - `references` 未指定时使用原邮件的 Message ID - 消息中含有多个 `MessageSegment.subject` 或 `MessageSegment.reply` 时，只取第一个

functions.name: nonebot.adapters.mail.utils.escape_bytelines
documentation:
Escape a list of bytearrays to a string.

- `s`: The list of bytearrays to escape.

functions.name: nonebot.adapters.mail.utils.extract_mail_parts
documentation:
Extract email parts from a Message object.

- `message`: The Message object to extract.

functions.name: nonebot.adapters.mail.utils.parse_attachment
documentation:
Parse the attachment and return the Attachment object.

- `attachment`: The attachment to parse.

functions.name: nonebot.adapters.mail.utils.parse_byte_mail
documentation:
Parse the mail and return the Mail object.

- `byte_mail`: The byte mail to parse.

methods.name: nonebot.adapters.mail.bot.Bot.send
documentation:
Send a message to the event.

- `event`: The event to reply.
- `message`: The message to send.
- `reply`: Whether using default reply settings.
- `kwargs`: Other arguments.
    - `cc`: The list of CC recipients.
    - `bcc`: The list of BCC recipients.
    - `subject`: The subject of the mail.
    - `in_reply_to`: The Message ID of the mail to reply to.
    - `references`: The list of Message IDs of the mails in the thread.
    - `reply_to`: The list of addresses to recommend recipients to reply to.

methods.name: nonebot.adapters.mail.bot.Bot.send_to
documentation:
Send a mail to the given recipient(s).

- `recipient`: The recipient(s) to send the mail to.
- `message`: The message to send.
- `kwargs`: Other arguments.
    - `cc`: The list of CC recipients.
    - `bcc`: The list of BCC recipients.
    - `subject`: The subject of the mail.
    - `in_reply_to`: The Message ID of the mail to reply to.
    - `references`: The list of Message IDs of the mails in the thread.
    - `reply_to`: The list of addresses to recommend recipients to reply to.

methods.name: nonebot.adapters.mail.bot.Bot.send_mail
documentation:
Send a mail to the given recipients.

- `message`: The message to send.
- `subject`: The subject of the mail.
- `recipients`: The list of recipients to send the mail to.
- `cc`: The list of CC recipients.
- `bcc`: The list of BCC recipients.
- `in_reply_to`: The Message ID of the mail to reply to.
- `references`: The list of Message IDs of the mails in the thread.
- `reply_to`: The list of addresses to recommend recipients to reply to.

methods.name: nonebot.adapters.mail.bot.Bot.login
documentation: Login to the IMAP server.

methods.name: nonebot.adapters.mail.bot.Bot.logout
documentation: Logout from the IMAP server.

methods.name: nonebot.adapters.mail.bot.Bot.select_mailbox
documentation:
Select the mailbox on the IMAP server.

- `mailbox`: The mailbox to select. Default is "INBOX".

methods.name: nonebot.adapters.mail.bot.Bot.fetch_mail_of_uid
documentation:
Get the mail of the given UID from the current mailbox.

- `mail_uid`: The UID of the mail to fetch.

methods.name: nonebot.adapters.mail.bot.Bot.fetch_mail_list
documentation:
Fetch mails in current mailbox with the given IMAP search key.

Note:

- This will mark the mails as seen.
- The default key is "ALL".
- Available keys: https://www.rfc-editor.org/rfc/rfc3501#section-6.4.4

methods.name: nonebot.adapters.mail.bot.Bot.fetch_seen_mail_list
documentation: Fetch seen mails in current mailbox.

methods.name: nonebot.adapters.mail.bot.Bot.fetch_unseen_mail_list
documentation: Fetch unseen mails in current mailbox and mark them as seen.

methods.name: nonebot.adapters.mail.bot.Bot.fetch_mail_of_id_in_mailbox
documentation:
Get the mail of the given Message ID from the given mailbox.

- `mail_id`: The Message ID of the mail to search for.
- `mailbox`: The mailbox to search in. Default is "INBOX".

methods.name: nonebot.adapters.mail.bot.Bot.fetch_mail_of_id
documentation:
Get the mail of the given Message ID from the INBOX or Sent mailboxes.

- `mail_id`: The Message ID of the mail to search for.
